content:
Original Narrative
ETHNIC INTIMIDATION | MENACING
Sir,
On August 27, 2017, while assigned to zone car 5B24, while accompanied with PO O’Neill 1584 we responded to 18210 Windward for a menacing complaint. Below are the details ofthe incident. Upon our arrival we spoke with Mr. Hockenberry (witness 1) who sated that the unknown male (offender) went up and down the street shouting at Ms. Bledsoe (victim 1) and Ms. Mason (victim 2). Mr. Hockenberry stated that the unknown male started saying numerous racial slurs to Ms. Bledsoe and Ms. Mason such as, “go away niggers,” “stupid niggers,” and just continued to yell. Upon speaking with both Ms. Bledsoe and Ms. Mason they stated that they were standing outside Ms. Bledsoe’s home when this unknown male walked on down the opposite side of the street and started yelling at them. Ms. Bledsoe states that when he came closer, she could hear himusing racial slurs. Both Ms. Bledsoe and Ms. Mason stated that the unknown male said, “You fucking niggers,” “nobody wants you here, niggers, so go away” and just kept saying “nigger” randomly. Ms. Bledsoe stated that the unknown male was started to escalate in volume and aggressiveness until the neighbors came out.
Ms. Mason stated that when the neighbors came out, the unknown male started to tone it down and she proceeded to call the police. Ms. Bledsoe stated that once she called the police the male started to walk away toward Lake Shore Blvd after he proceeded to leave his beer in a white bag under a tree at 18210 Windward.
Ms. Bledsoe can provide a video of the incident.
5S23, Sgt. Crisan 9166 on scene Chief ofPolice notified
Evidence collected and M-T-E D5, page 117, line 14 WCS activated for incident 9198, 6142
Unknown Suspect: white male, 5’7”, 150 lbs., gray hair, blue shirt with designs on front and black and black jeans Respectfully request Detective Bureau to follow-up SDCO.DD 17-278306 (I) 8-30-17
Page: 7 of 7
